profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Repower Asia Indonesia Tbk engages in the development, buying, selling, and operating of real estate properties in Indonesia. The company offers apartment buildings, residential and non-residential buildings, the provision of houses and apartments, land sales activities, and the development of buildings for self-operation. PT Repower Asia Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
